highlights.text: Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall & Palm Jumeirah city tour
Thrilling desert safari with BBQ dinner under the stars
Global Village cultural pavilions & family entertainment

itinerary.title: Dubai Essentials Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Dubai • Burj Khalifa • Desert Safari • Palm Jumeirah • Global Village
itinerary.overview: Discover the dazzling heights and golden dunes of Dubai with this TRAGUIN curated family itinerary. Designed for excitement and comfort, this Dubai Essentials package offers a flawless blend of futuristic city exploration and traditional desert adventure — with handpicked hotels and exclusive services.
itinerary.seo_title: UAE-001 | Dubai Essentials Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Dubai family package (UAE-001): Burj Khalifa, desert safari, Palm Jumeirah, and Global Village.

days.title: Arrival in Dubai
days.description: Arrive in dazzling Dubai. Your private TRAGUIN transfer will escort you to your handpicked hotel. Enjoy a relaxing evening overlooking the city's stunning skyline.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, private hotel transfer
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: City Tour & Burj Khalifa
days.description: Explore the iconic attractions of Dubai. Visit the Burj Khalifa, the Dubai Mall, and Palm Jumeirah. This curated experience offers deep insights into Dubai's rapid development.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Palm Jumeirah city tour

days.title: Desert Safari Adventure
days.description: Embark on a thrilling desert safari. Experience dune bashing, camel riding, and a traditional BBQ dinner under the stars — a highlight of TRAGUIN's exclusive packages.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Desert safari, dune bashing, camel riding, BBQ dinner
Meals Included: Breakfast & Desert BBQ Dinner

days.title: Global Village & Leisure
days.description: A full day of immersive fun at Global Village. Explore cultural pavilions, shopping, and entertainment, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Global Village full-day visit

days.title: Departure
days.description: Enjoy a final family breakfast. Your private TRAGUIN chauffeur ensures a comfortable transfer to the airport.

inclusions.text: 04 Nights in handpicked premium family hotel in Dubai
Dubai city tour — Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall & Palm Jumeirah
Desert safari with dune bashing, camel riding & BBQ dinner
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and UAE entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
